error.signature: type 'Null' is not a subtype of type 'String' in type cast
error.regex: (type '.*' is not a subtype of type '.*'( in type cast)?|_CastError|TypeError.*subtype|type cast.*failed)

verdict.summary: Runtime type cast failure. A value (often null or wrong type) is being cast to an incompatible type, frequently from JSON parsing or API responses.

dead_ends.action: Cast with 'as' keyword everywhere to force types
dead_ends.why_fails: 'as' throws at runtime when the cast fails; it does not convert types, only asserts them

dead_ends.action: Disable null safety to avoid type cast errors
dead_ends.why_fails: Disabling null safety removes all compile-time type checking; makes ALL type issues silent runtime failures

workarounds.action: Use safe parsing with null-aware operators and default values
workarounds.how: final name = json['name'] as String? ?? 'unknown';  // safe cast with fallback

workarounds.action: Use fromJson factory constructors with explicit type handling
workarounds.how: factory User.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) => User(name: json['name']?.toString() ?? '');

workarounds.action: Validate API response structure before casting
workarounds.how: if (json case {'name': String name, 'age': int age}) { ... }  // Dart 3 pattern matching
